name: agent-pipeline
description: Label-driven GitHub issue→ready-to-deploy pipeline skill for Claude Code and Codex, built from a single shared TypeScript core.

scripts.test: (cd core && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm test) && node --test scripts/install.test.mjs
scripts.ci: npm test && node scripts/build.mjs --check && npm run ci:install-smoke
